name: Highway Love
overview: When a confident and feisty girl fixes an awkward but endearing guy's car on the expressway, a warm-hearted love story starts to take life. As the guy finds himself smitten by this enigmatic girl, he learns to come out of his shell. Meanwhile, the girl learns to believe in the existence of true, unconditional love as they navigate the diversions, detours and pit-stops of their romantic journey.

trailers.title: Highway Love 🚗💕| Official Trailer 2023 | ft. Ritvik Sahore & Gayatri Bhardwaj | Amazon miniTV
